subcodes.first_line: God willing, may they ever continue to drink from the inexhaustible chalice of His bountiful grace, and with hearts attuned to His mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله لم یزل و لایزال از کاس عنایت بیزوال بیاشامند و بذکر
